name: Iaian
description: Iaian is the A-Class Rank 2 professional hero of the Hero Association and the top disciple of Atomic Samurai. Iaian is described to be persistent in battle, refusing to back down regardless of whether his enemy is stronger or more skilled. Despite his persistence, he is in fact very analytical in battle, determining the strength of his opponent, all of their abilities and he also does not underestimate his opponent.
